name: Number C92: Heart-eartH Chaos Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>９２ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>偽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>骸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>虚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｈｅａｒｔ－ｅａｒｔＨ Ｃｈａｏｓ Ｄｒａｇｏｎ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ハートアース・カオス・ドラゴン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Kyūjūni Gigaikyoryū Hāto Āsu Kaosu Doragon
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 92: Fake-Body Void Dragon, Heart-eartH Chaos Dragon
desc:
4 Level 10 monsters
Cannot be destroyed by battle. If a monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You gain LP equal to the damage they took. If this card has "Number 92: Heart-eartH Dragon" as material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the effects of all face-up cards your opponent currently controls, until the end of this turn. This activation and effect cannot be negated.
mnst_eff:
4 Level 10 monsters

mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
